chunks.title: The Plague on Livestock
chunks.reason: Narrative unit covering the warning, execution, and result of the first plague.

chunks.title: The Plague of Boils
chunks.reason: Narrative unit covering the preparation, execution, and result of the second plague.

chunks.title: Warning of Hail
chunks.reason: Oracle containing Yahweh's warning and the distinction made by Pharaoh's servants.

chunks.title: The Plague of Hail
chunks.reason: Narrative unit covering the execution of the hail, the partial relief, and Pharaoh's final hardening.
